decisions.rationale: IR re-read (drsam-99657.bubble static text on ai_RNbBHYUu/ai_RNbBHYUv and tab buttons ai_RNbBHYUz/ai_RNbBHYVE) confirms divergence: title should be "Settings" not "Account Settings", subtitle should end "account details" not "security", privacy tab "Privacy & Data", admin tab "Admin Dashboard". Valid ui-fidelity gap on named SET-01 ui_refs, but SET-01 ACs gate hierarchy, tab routing, and style_ref on ai_RNbBHYUw — not verbatim presentation.text on every chrome label. criteria_audit, functional_audit, and ui_evidence all pass; slug-keyed tab switching is unaffected. Downstream SET-02..SET-10 depend_on SET-01 for tab chrome mount and panel visibility, not header/tab display strings. ~6 string edits in SettingsMain.tsx and SETTINGS_TAB_DISPLAY_LABELS are easy IR alignment; defer to a settings chrome copy-parity pass before visual QA (can land with SET-02 or as a SET-01 polish rewrite).

IR re-read (ir/resolver.json element order under ai_RNbBHYUw, drsam-99657.bubble tab-bar children) confirms Bubble order is notifications (ai_RNbBHYVB / ai_RNbBHYeD) before workplace (ai_RNbBHYVC / ai_RNbBHYeE). SETTINGS_TAB_ORDER places workplace before notifications, and SETTINGS_TAB_BUTTON_BUBBLE_IDS maps workplace→ai_RNbBHYVB and notifications→ai_RNbBHYVC — swapped vs IR element identity. Functional slug routing and panel bubble ids (ai_RNbBHYXy notifications, ai_RNbBHYYM workplace) are correct; FV-1/FV-3 pass. criteria_audit AC-2 passes on button presence and data-bubble-id markers; downstream SET-06-notifications-tab-and-save and SET-08-workplace-tab-and-link-flow depends_on gates are satisfiable via panel mount points, not tab-bar DOM order. Reorder SETTINGS_TAB_ORDER and swap the two bubble-id map entries (~4 lines in settingsTabs.ts/settingsTabStub.ts) — trivial but parity-tooling hygiene; batch with C-1 in the same settings chrome IR alignment pass.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 settings chrome copy parity (ai_RNbBHYUu/ai_RNbBHYUv header strings, Privacy & Data / Admin Dashboard tab labels); C-2 notifications-before-workplace tab order and ai_RNbBHYVB/ai_RNbBHYVC bubble-id swap (easy IR alignment, functional routing unaffected). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
